positive.prompt: Set up internationalization (i18n) and localization in this React application
Add translation files for Spanish and French to our app
How do I support RTL layout direction for Arabic localization?

negative.prompt: Apply Tailwind CSS styles to this form component
Write a bash script to translate text files

evals.prompt: Add i18next configuration and localization resources for English and Japanese translations.
evals.expected_output: Translation resources formatted in JSON and dynamic localization hooks used.
expectations: Translation keys are structured logically in JSON format
Localization hooks or helpers are used instead of hardcoded strings
RTL layout considerations are addressed if needed
